description_long: This shotgun features a robust, futuristic design with a predominantly white and black color scheme accented by metallic and brass elements. The body is angular and heavily built, with a large, ribbed black foregrip and a secondary handle on top for improved maneuverability. The barrel is short and thick, with a reinforced muzzle and visible venting along the upper receiver. The trigger area is protected by a large, rounded guard, and the grip is textured for secure handling. The shotgun also includes a prominent top rail and side-mounted components, suggesting modularity and tactical use. Its overall appearance is that of a high-tech, urban combat weapon designed for close-quarters engagements.
description: A futuristic, heavy-duty shotgun with a white and black body, ribbed foregrip, and metallic accents, featuring a compact barrel and tactical handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick, ribbed black foregrip and the reinforced muzzle, with the barrel's opening clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the shotgun, the top carry handle, the angular body, and the detailed trigger and grip area.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver, the top handle, and the alignment of the barrel and stock area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the ribbed foregrip, side-mounted components, and the overall compactness of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and thick with visible venting and reinforced muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and ample space
